summary: Created comprehensive Block Picker Policy v2 documentation that formalizes all selection logic from D0.3 and D0.4. Document includes recipe selection rules, always/conditional framework, LLM analysis criteria, Zo Take Heed trigger patterns, priority relevance scoring, and complete decision flowchart.

document_sections.description: Content-driven selection, priority weighting, recipe foundation, trigger overrides
Algorithm for choosing recipe based on meeting type and participants, with characteristics table
Definition and strategy for block categorization with distribution targets
LLM analysis framework with selection criteria by block type and quality thresholds
Three trigger categories (B07, B14, B00) with patterns and behavior documentation
Domain weights, block priority mapping, and selection bias implementation
Complete mermaid flowchart showing recipe selection → LLM analysis → trigger override → final selection
Technical architecture, parameters, error handling, and performance characteristics

policy_highlights: 6 recipes documented with always/conditional block distributions
27 total blocks categorized with selection criteria
3 trigger pattern categories with 10+ specific patterns
5 priority domains mapped to block relevance scoring
Complete decision flowchart with 20+ decision points
LLM analysis framework with structured JSON output format
Error handling and performance specifications included
notes_for_orchestrator: Policy document is comprehensive and ready for reference by future development. All logic from block_selector.py is formally documented with decision rationale. Document serves as both technical specification and operational guide for the block selection system.
